metadata.author: Paul
metadata.subject: Christ Being Superior to Judaism and Everything Related to It, and the New Covenant Being Better Than the Old Covenant.

1: God, having spoken of old in many portions and in many ways to the fathers in the prophets,
Has at the last of these days spoken to us in the Son, whom He appointed Heir of all things, through whom also He made the universe.
4: For the word of God is living and operative and sharper than any two-edged sword... and able to discern the thoughts and intentions of the heart.
Let us therefore come forward with boldness to the throne of grace that we may receive mercy and find grace for timely help.
11: Now faith is the substantiation of things hoped for, the conviction of things not seen.
12: Looking away unto Jesus, the Author and Perfecter of our faith.

12.text: The living word of God functions as a sword to divide our soul from our spirit, enabling us to touch God in our spirit without being entangled by our wandering soul.

16.text: The throne of grace is in the heavens, but since we are joined to the Lord in our spirit, we touch this throne whenever we turn to our spirit.
